entries.quote: What we did to high forex charges on cards way back in 2018 by introducing 'zero forex' cards, we will do the same to high forex charges on currency notes exchange in 2026 - i.e make it super transparent & affordable for consumers.
entries.signal: Niyo aggressively expanding beyond travel cards into physical currency exchange (Niyo Express home delivery/pickup), directly targeting forex margin extraction—a threat to travel card monetization on currency spreads.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes forex inefficiency across channels (cards + notes) is a structural market gap worth solving; significant product/go-to-market investment signals conviction in physical cash business as core growth lever.
